name: DOMINION ENERGY, INC
summary: Dominion Energy, Inc. is a regulated energy company providing electric generation, transmission, and distribution services, as well as natural gas distribution services. The company operates through subsidiaries including Virginia Power, participates in PJM energy markets, and is developing offshore wind energy projects such as the CVOW Commercial Project, serving industrial, commercial, and residential customers.
